meta.title: Primate hair dichromatism — module selection (interactive spec)
meta.description: Data decomposition of the module-selection figures for interactive rendering. Each figure block carries the data + encoding so another agent can render HTML/D3/plotly and embed primate photos. static_figure points to the code-generated PNG in the repo.
meta.data_provenance: HPC commit 4c07317 (full-panel aBSREL branch_rates + per-origin RELAX K) + own ASR origins + STRING v12 human edges (score>=400)
meta.caveat: aBSREL episodic selection at tips; a gene 'difference' marks lineage-specific selection, NOT proven causation of the phenotype.

sister_pair_contrast.headline: Genes under selection in a dichromatic taxon but NOT its closest monochromatic relative — candidate loci for the trait difference.
sister_pair_contrast.recurrent_gene: KITLG (pigmentation-side; recurs across Hylobates, Trachypithecus x4, Colobus, Erythrocebus, Alouatta)
